pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler configuration to target Java 21 using the 'release' flag instead of separate source/target flags.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; compiling with source/target 11 would produce bytecode incompatible with the new JDK version and fail to utilize Java 21 features or libraries.
pom.xml.after:
<!-- Use release to ensure correct cross-compilation for Java 21 -->
                    <release>${maven.compiler.release}</release>

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.general_idea: Remove the 'created_at' column from the INSERT statement to align with a schema change where the timestamp is likely managed by the database default.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.why_exists: SQL syntax error or column not found exception at runtime if the 'created_at' column no longer exists in the 'links' table.
